"C:\Program Files\CMake\bin\cmake.exe" -E rm -f CMakeFiles\kvstore.dir/objects.a
D:\msys64\mingw64\bin\ar.exe qc CMakeFiles\kvstore.dir/objects.a @CMakeFiles\kvstore.dir\objects1.rsp
D:\msys64\mingw64\bin\c++.exe -Wl,--whole-archive CMakeFiles\kvstore.dir/objects.a -Wl,--no-whole-archive -o kvstore.exe -Wl,--out-implib,libkvstore.dll.a -Wl,--major-image-version,0,--minor-image-version,0 @CMakeFiles\kvstore.dir\linkLibs.rsp
